Distribution Network  •  Est. 1915

Baked in Ybor.
Delivered Everywhere.

From Tampa Bay to the Pacific Northwest — La Segunda authentic Cuban bread reaches kitchens across the country through 11 of the nation's top foodservice distributors, and fresh to Tampa Bay businesses every single morning.

Nationwide Foodservice

Order Through
Your Distributor

Already have a Sysco, US Foods, or GFS account? Ask your rep for La Segunda Central Bakery products. No new accounts, no new relationships — just add us to your existing order.

Frozen Nationwide

18" & 36" Cuban Bread, Media Noche Rolls, Coca Buns, and Honey Wheat — 270-day shelf life, thaw & serve.

EDI Supported

National foodservice accounts can order via EDI through their existing distributor relationship.

Our Distributor Network

Contact your local rep and ask for La Segunda. Not sure who handles your area? Call Giuseppe — he’ll connect you directly.

Tampa Bay Area

Fresh. Daily.
No Middleman.

Our own trucks run daily routes across the greater Tampa Bay area. Fresh hoagie rolls, Cuban bread, deli breads, and bucket breads — straight from our Ybor City ovens to your back door every morning.

No freezing. Everything arrives fresh-baked that morning.

No distributor markup. You’re buying direct from the bakery.

Full lineup. Hoagies, rolls, buckets, Cuban bread — all available daily.

20 delivery zones covering the full Tampa Bay region.

Set Up Fresh Delivery

Call or email Giuseppe to set up a daily delivery route for your location. He’ll confirm your zone, discuss your product needs, and get you on the schedule.
